routingRules.name: greetings
routingRules.reason: Greeting queries require minimal reasoning and can be handled by a lightweight model.

routingRules.name: strategy
routingRules.reason: Complex startup business strategy, fundraising, and financial tasks require advanced reasoning from a flagship model.

routingRules.name: long_context
routingRules.reason: Conversations with deep history require higher capability models for consistency and context adherence.

routingRules.name: default
routingRules.reason: General query routed to cost-effective default model.
